_comment: Quests batch-2 REPEATABLE / scripted quest-object grants (server/intent-questb.ts). Unlike data/quest-rewards.json (idempotent ONCE-per-stage completion rewards), these are stage-gated quest-flow hand-outs that may legitimately repeat (pick a renewable wheat sheaf, re-issue a lost receipt, run the cursed mill demo). Each key is a server-defined grant id; the client sends only { grant:'<id>' } and the server INDEPENDENTLY validates the quest+stage gate, consumes any cost, checks room, and grants EXACTLY `out`. The client never supplies item/qty/cost. `stageMin`/`stageMax` gate on the player's SERVER quest stage (questb-grant never advances a stage); `cost` items/coins are consumed server-side; `consume` removes a held item as part of the transform (e.g. one wheat -> two wheat). `once:true` collapses to single-grant-per-(quest,stage) via the same idempotency marker as a reward claim.
